steps.title: Locate the underlined sentence's role
steps.content: The sentence before the underlined one argues that the workers "developed and refined their joining process over the course of production." The underlined sentence opens with "For example" and then contrasts the first join (clear misalignment) with later joins (virtually invisible) — this is concrete evidence for that argument about the workers.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It identifies the people and events depicted in the Bayeux Tapestry.': The sentence is about how panels were joined, not about people or events shown in the tapestry's imagery. ✗
  • Choice B — 'It supports an argument about the workers who produced the Bayeux Tapestry.': The sentence provides the "For example" evidence that workers improved their technique over time — directly supporting the preceding argument about the workers. ✓
  • Choice C — 'It compares the Bayeux Tapestry with other tapestries from eleventh-century France.': The comparison is between early and late joins within the same tapestry, not between tapestries. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It describes how researchers determined where the Bayeux Tapestry was produced.': The sentence says nothing about establishing the tapestry's place of origin. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
